scenes.text:
How you dress is how you
tell the world to treat you.

Enclothed cognition is real science. Studies prove that what you wear affects how you think, feel, and perform. When you dress sharp, your brain releases chemicals that
boost confidence. You stand taller. You speak clearer. You command more respect. Not because clothes make the man, but because clothes remind the man who he is.

You do not need expensive clothes. You need clean, fitted clothes that make you
feel powerful. Iron your shirt. Polish your shoes. Look like you respect yourself.

Dress for the life you want,
not the life you have.
scenes.highlight: Dress for the life you want

scenes.text:
What outfit makes you feel unstoppable?
Comment below. Follow for level-up content.
